description_long: This is a large, rectangular grocery bag with a wide, top-facing zippered opening and two sturdy loop handles attached vertically on both sides. The main body of the bag is a light beige color with a subtle textured pattern, while the base, handles, and trim are a contrasting dark brown, likely made of synthetic or reinforced fabric. The bag appears to have a reinforced bottom and vertical straps for added durability and structure, making it suitable for carrying heavy groceries. The zipper closure runs the full length of the top, providing secure containment for items inside. The bag's sides are slightly tapered, giving it a spacious interior that narrows toward the base. No branding, logos, or visible designs are present on the exterior, and the bag appears empty with no visible contents.
description: A large, beige grocery bag with dark brown loop handles, reinforced base, and a full-length top zipper. The bag is unbranded, textured, and appears empty.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width, two vertical dark brown handles, and reinforced base and trim.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the narrow profile, visible zipper along the top, and the thickness of the bag.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with matching handles and trim, no visible branding or design.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the narrow profile and top zipper, mirroring view 1.
